CONTEXT OVERRIDE: 2 matches — "Hua Tuo from Qiao" and "Qiao Rui". Qiao here = Qiao County [1160] of Pei Commandery (Hua Tuo's real birthplace); Qiao Commandery didn't exist until 220 AD. The Qiao Rui match is a person name anyway.

CONTEXT OVERRIDE: 2 "Wucheng" matches refer to Sun Ce's Wujun campaign (Wucheng in Wujun). Neither this [1013] (Bing Province) nor [1431] (Jing Province) is the right Wucheng. DB is missing a Wujun Wucheng.
19 "Lu Bu"

5 "Zhang Fei"
wrong Wucheng — Sun Ce campaign's Wucheng is in Wujun; this Settlement is in Nanyang area
1 "Lu Fan, from Runan" — should tag Runan Commandery [12], not this City duplicate

cn=劉岱 — different Liu Dai (Cao Cao general). Chapter 15 references the Yanzhou-governor Liu Dai [1325] (deceased) in past tense.
cn=劉曜 — different Liu Yao.
cn=路蕃 — different Lu Fan. Historical Sun Ce adviser is 呂範, not in DB.

cn=爰邵 — different Yuan Shao.
cn=張弘 — different Zhang Hong (Lü Bu general).
